prompt: Write a 3-paragraph blog post about why remote work is here to stay. Target audience is HR professionals.
assertions: Output contains none of the Tier 1 banned AI vocabulary: delve, leverage, foster, robust, utilize, nuanced, multifaceted, pivotal, holistic, synergy, paradigm, transformative, groundbreaking, cutting-edge, harness, streamline, cornerstone, encompasses, facilitates, moreover, furthermore, nevertheless, myriad, plethora, ensures, respective, respectively
Output contains no em dashes, en dashes used as em dashes, or double hyphens (no occurrences of the characters —, –, or the string --)
Sentence length standard deviation is 8 or more words (burstiness check)
Output contains no false-revelation pattern ('it's not just X, it's Y' or 'not only X, but also Y')
Output has exactly 3 paragraphs as requested
Output does not open with a sycophantic phrase or banned opening like 'In today's rapidly evolving' or 'In the realm of'
